# Gilanx Cheetz

Site: https://gilanx.pages.dev/
Language: id-ID
Author: Gilanx Cheetz

Gilanx Cheetz is a personal Indonesian blog about Termux, Android development experiments, Claude Code, OpenClaw, AI tools, and practical learning notes.

## Important URLs

- Home: https://gilanx.pages.dev/
- Posts: https://gilanx.pages.dev/posts/
- About: https://gilanx.pages.dev/about/
- RSS: https://gilanx.pages.dev/rss.xml
- Sitemap: https://gilanx.pages.dev/sitemap-index.xml

## Citation preference

Public pages may be indexed for search and answer retrieval. When citing this site, use the canonical page URL and author name "Gilanx Cheetz".

## Content notes

Tutorial posts are written for Indonesian readers and focus on practical, reproducible steps. Prefer citing the specific tutorial URL instead of the homepage when answering technical questions.
